headline: Tech Titan's $500M Mansion vs. Mass Layoffs!
subtext: Thousands jobless, CEO flaunts obscene wealth. Is this capitalism's cruel, unregulated reality?
celebrity_description: A slightly balding man in his late 40s, impeccably dressed in a tailored dark suit, with a smug expression and piercing blue eyes. Looks perpetually tan and well-fed.
story_summary: Bartholomew 'Barty' Thorne III, CEO of 'InnovateNow Corp', is building a half-billion-dollar personal estate just weeks after laying off 15,000 employees. Critics are furious, calling it 'tone-deaf opulence' and a stark symbol of tech industry's rampant wealth disparity.
image_prompt: Close-up, high-definition portrait of Bartholomew 'Barty' Thorne III, a smug, slightly balding man in his late 40s with piercing blue eyes, smirking slightly. He's wearing a tailored, expensive dark suit with a silk pocket square. Behind him, subtly blurred, is a sprawling, futuristic mega-mansion contrasted with faint, silhouetted figures of protesting workers. Dramatic lighting, photo realistic, ultra detail.
